seo.title: Setu Technology | Business Software Built for Every Operator
seo.description: Setu — bridge for your business. Operational software built for how businesses actually run, starting with Setu Dine for restaurants. Expanding to retail, clinics and beyond.

hero.headline: Business software built for how you actually work
hero.subheadline: Setu builds operational software for businesses globally — starting with restaurants, expanding to every industry.

tools.headline: Free tools to run your business
tools.subtext: No signup, no install — start using them right in your browser.

cards.name: Browser Based POS
cards.description: A free, no-install point of sale that runs in any browser — start billing in minutes with nothing to download.

cards.name: QR Menu Generator
cards.tagline: Your menu in a QR code
cards.description: Build your menu and get a print-ready QR code — the entire menu lives inside the QR itself, no hosting needed.

cards.name: Invoice Generator
cards.description: Create professional, GST-compliant invoices in minutes — fill, customise and download as PDF. No signup.

cards.name: More free tools
cards.description: UPI QR, barcodes, stock and purchase registers, cash book, customer ledger and more — all free.

calculators.headline: Business calculators, built for operators
calculators.subtext: Quick answers for the numbers you check every week — no signup, just results.

cards.name: Recipe Costing Calculator
cards.description: Break a dish down to its ingredient costs and see the real cost per plate before you price it.

cards.name: GST Calculator
cards.description: Add GST to a base price or pull GST out of a final price, for any slab — get the split in a tap.

cards.name: Online Menu Price Calculator
cards.description: Work back from the margin you need after commission, packaging and discounts to the price you should list.

cards.name: More calculators
cards.description: Break-even, food cost %, markup, loan EMI, take-home salary and more — all free to use.

services.headline: Beyond software — services that run your back office
services.subtext: Not just tools. Setu also runs the work for you, starting with accounting.

cards.name: Accounting, Bookkeeping & Payroll
cards.description: Outsourced accounting, bookkeeping and payroll for SMEs — weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, quarterly or yearly. Bank reconciliation, P&L, balance sheet, cash flow and more.
points: Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow

whySetu.headline: Why operators in India and beyond choose Setu
whySetu.subtext: Built for global businesses, not retrofitted from somewhere else.

items.heading: Built for global businesses
items.body: Not a Western product retrofitted. Built from the ground up for local tax rules, local payment methods, multi-currency and local languages.

items.heading: One system, every outlet
items.body: Whether you have 1 location or 20, Setu scales without adding complexity.

items.heading: Owned by operators
items.body: Every feature in Setu exists because a real business owner needed it.

items.heading: Support that answers
items.body: Real humans, fast responses. Not a ticket system that replies in 5 days.

socialProof.headline: Built for how your business actually runs

stats.label: Compliant billing, out of the box

ctaBanner.headline: Ready to see Setu in action?
ctaBanner.subtext: Book a free 30-minute demo. We'll show you exactly how Setu works for your business.
